hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | { read -r line; if [ -n "$line" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Uncommitted changes exist. Ask the user before committing — commits and pushes require explicit approval."}'; fi; } || true

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+push.*\b(origin\s+)?(main|master)\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct push to main/master is blocked. Create a feature/ branch and open a PR."}}'; fi || true

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); case "$file" in *ruff.toml|*.pre-commit-config.yaml|*.github/workflows/*|*tsconfig.json) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Quality-gate config file. State intent to the user and get explicit approval before modifying."}}' ;; *pyproject.toml) changed=$(echo "$input" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); ti=d.get('tool_input',{}); print(ti.get('old_string','') + ti.get('new_string','') + ti.get('content',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$changed" | grep -qE '\[tool\.(ruff|mypy|pytest|coverage)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Edits to [tool.ruff]/[tool.mypy]/[tool.pytest]/[tool.coverage] need explicit user approval."}}'; fi ;; esac || true

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path', d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','')))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); case "$file" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null ;; esac || true
